rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Powershell Commandlets (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Powershell Commandlets (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 68490f55-bf8d-489d-995a-5ceae34ce215
status: experimental
description: Detects the execution of powershell.exe with suspicious cmdlets or options.
  Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/powershell/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059.001
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \powershell.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - -nop
    - -noni
    - invoke-expression
    - iex
    - .downloadstring
    - downloadfile
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
